Issues: The image is highly reliant on common fantasy tropes (bioluminescent forest, glowing mists, god rays), which can make it feel cliché.

The extreme contrast and saturation, while artistically effective, might suffer in physical print media. Deep shadows and intense glow elements can lose detail or appear muddy when printed at different color profiles.
The figure in the center is very small compared to the overwhelming scale of the trees, which minimizes the narrative impact of the subject.
